homepage.heroSubline: Durable driveways, patios, and walkways crafted for Texas weather. Serving Arlington and the DFW metroplex with quality and integrity.
aboutText: Arlington Pavers Inc started with a simple goal: to provide Arlington, TX, and the surrounding communities with paving solutions built to last. We're not just laying pavers; we're building relationships and enhancing homes across Tarrant County.

Our commitment to quality is unwavering. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, we prioritize clear communication, meticulous craftsmanship, and using only the finest materials. We understand the unique challenges of the Texas climate, ensuring every project withstands the test of time.

We're proud to be a part of the Arlington community. We actively support local initiatives and believe in giving back to the neighborhoods we serve. When you choose Arlington Pavers Inc, you're choosing a local business that cares.

services.name: Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's curb appeal with a durable and stylish paved driveway.
services.description:
A well-paved driveway is more than just a place to park your car; it's a statement about your home. At Arlington Pavers Inc, we specialize in crafting driveways that are both beautiful and built to last. We handle everything from initial design and excavation to paver installation and sealing. We offer a wide variety of paver materials, colors, and patterns to complement your home's architecture, whether it's a classic 1960s ranch or a modern new build. 

Given Arlington's climate, we use paving materials specifically designed to withstand the Texas heat and occasional ice storms. Proper drainage is crucial, and we ensure your driveway is graded correctly to prevent water damage. We also offer repair and maintenance services to keep your driveway looking its best for years to come. From concrete pavers to brick and natural stone, we'll help you choose the perfect material to create a driveway that enhances your property's value and curb appeal.

Our team meticulously prepares the sub-base, ensuring a solid foundation that prevents shifting and cracking. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise paver placement and proper joint spacing for optimal performance. We finish every project with a thorough cleaning and sealing, protecting your investment from the elements.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment and Design Consultation: We evaluate your property and discuss your design preferences.
Step 2: Excavation and Base Preparation: We prepare a solid foundation for your driveway.
Step 3: Paver Installation: We carefully lay each paver according to the approved design.
Step 4: Compaction and Sealing: We compact the pavers and apply a sealant for lasting protection.

faq.question: How long does driveway paving take?
faq.answer: Most driveway paving projects take between 3-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the design.

faq.question: What types of pavers are best for driveways?
faq.answer: Concrete pavers and brick are excellent choices for driveways due to their durability and resistance to wear and tear.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for driveway paving?
faq.answer: It depends on the scope of the project and local regulations. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

services.name: Patio Paving
services.shortDescription: Create the perfect outdoor living space with a custom-designed paved patio.
services.description:
Transform your backyard into an oasis with a custom-paved patio from Arlington Pavers Inc. We specialize in designing and installing patios that are both functional and beautiful, perfect for entertaining or simply relaxing outdoors. Whether you envision a cozy space for intimate gatherings or a large area for family barbecues, we can bring your vision to life.

We offer a wide range of paver materials, from classic brick to elegant natural stone, allowing you to create a patio that perfectly complements your home's style. We consider the unique challenges of the Texas climate when designing your patio, ensuring proper drainage to prevent water damage and choosing materials that can withstand the intense heat. We can also incorporate features like fire pits, outdoor kitchens, and seating areas to create a truly customized outdoor living space.

Our team works closely with you throughout the entire process, from initial design to final installation. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise paver placement and a flawless finish. We also offer patio repair and maintenance services to keep your patio looking its best for years to come. We understand the importance of creating a space that you'll love, and we're committed to delivering exceptional quality and craftsmanship on every project.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation: We discuss your vision for your patio and create a custom design.
Step 2: Site Preparation: We clear and level the area to prepare for paver installation.
Step 3: Paver Installation: We carefully lay the pavers according to the approved design.
Step 4: Finishing Touches: We add borders, seating areas, and other features to complete your patio.

faq.question: What is the best material for patio paving?
faq.answer: The best material depends on your personal preferences and budget. Concrete pavers are a cost-effective and durable option, while natural stone offers a more luxurious look.

faq.question: How much does patio paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of patio paving varies depending on the size of the patio, the materials used, and the complexity of the design. We offer free quotes to help you estimate the cost of your project.

faq.question: How do I maintain my paved patio?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping and occasional cleaning with a mild detergent are typically all that's needed to maintain a paved patio. Sealing the pavers can also help protect them from stains and fading.

services.name: Walkway Paving
services.shortDescription: Create inviting walkways that enhance your landscape and add curb appeal.
services.description:
Enhance the beauty and functionality of your property with custom-paved walkways from Arlington Pavers Inc. We specialize in designing and installing walkways that are both aesthetically pleasing and safe to navigate. Whether you need a pathway leading to your front door, a meandering garden path, or a functional walkway connecting different areas of your property, we can create a solution that meets your needs.

We offer a wide variety of paver materials, colors, and patterns to complement your home's style and landscape. We consider the unique challenges of the Texas climate when designing your walkways, ensuring proper drainage to prevent water damage and choosing materials that are slip-resistant. We can also incorporate lighting to enhance safety and create a welcoming ambiance.

Our team works closely with you throughout the entire process, from initial design to final installation. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise paver placement and a smooth, even surface. We also offer walkway repair and maintenance services to keep your walkways looking their best for years to come. Let us help you create walkways that enhance your property's beauty and functionality.
process: Step 1: Design and Planning: We work with you to design walkways that complement your landscape.
Step 2: Site Preparation: We clear and level the area to prepare for paver installation.
Step 3: Paver Installation: We carefully lay the pavers according to the approved design.
Step 4: Final Touches: We add lighting, borders, and other features to complete your walkways.

faq.question: What is the best paver material for walkways?
faq.answer: Flagstone, brick, and concrete pavers are all excellent choices for walkways. Consider the style of your home and landscape when choosing a material.

faq.question: How wide should a walkway be?
faq.answer: A walkway should be at least 3 feet wide to allow two people to walk comfortably side-by-side.

faq.question: How can I prevent weeds from growing in my walkways?
faq.answer: Using polymeric sand between the pavers can help prevent weed growth. Regular maintenance and occasional weeding are also recommended.

services.name: Paver Repairs & Restoration
services.shortDescription: Restore the beauty and integrity of your existing paved surfaces.
services.description:
Even the best-laid pavers can suffer damage over time due to weather, wear and tear, or shifting ground. Arlington Pavers Inc offers comprehensive paver repair and restoration services to keep your driveways, patios, and walkways looking their best. We address common issues such as cracked pavers, sunken areas, loose joints, and efflorescence.

Our experienced team will assess the damage and recommend the most effective repair solutions. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results. Whether you need a few pavers replaced or a complete restoration, we'll get the job done right. We understand the importance of maintaining the beauty and value of your paved surfaces, and we're committed to providing exceptional service and craftsmanship.

We meticulously match existing pavers to ensure a seamless repair. We also address underlying issues such as drainage problems or sub-base instability to prevent future damage. Our goal is to restore your paved surfaces to their original beauty and functionality, extending their lifespan and enhancing your property's curb appeal. We handle repairs on all types of paver installations, from residential driveways to commercial walkways.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment: We inspect your paved surfaces to identify the extent of the damage.
Step 2: Repair Plan: We develop a detailed repair plan and provide you with a free quote.
Step 3: Paver Replacement: We replace cracked, broken, or sunken pavers with matching materials.
Step 4: Joint Repair and Sealing: We repair loose joints and apply a sealant to protect your pavers.

faq.question: How do I know if my pavers need repair?
faq.answer: Signs of paver damage include cracked pavers, sunken areas, loose joints, and excessive weed growth.

faq.question: Can I repair pavers myself?
faq.answer: While some minor repairs can be done yourself, it's best to hire a professional for more extensive damage to ensure proper repair and avoid further problems.

faq.question: How often should I seal my pavers?
faq.answer: Pavers should be sealed every 2-3 years to protect them from stains, fading, and water damage.

services.name: Paver Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect your investment and enhance the beauty of your pavers with professional sealing.
services.description:
Paver sealing is an essential step in maintaining the beauty and longevity of your paved surfaces. At Arlington Pavers Inc, we offer professional paver sealing services that protect your pavers from stains, fading, and water damage. Sealing also helps to prevent weed growth and enhances the color and texture of your pavers.

Our experienced team uses high-quality sealants specifically designed for pavers. We thoroughly clean your pavers before applying the sealant to ensure proper adhesion and optimal protection. We offer a variety of sealant options, including matte, gloss, and wet-look finishes, allowing you to customize the look of your paved surfaces.

We understand the importance of protecting your investment, and we're committed to providing exceptional paver sealing services that deliver lasting results. Sealing your pavers not only enhances their appearance but also extends their lifespan, saving you money in the long run. Our sealing process is designed to penetrate deep into the paver, creating a barrier against the elements and preventing damage from occurring. Let us help you keep your pavers looking their best for years to come.
process: Step 1: Paver Cleaning: We thoroughly clean your pavers to remove dirt, debris, and stains.
Step 2: Joint Stabilization: We stabilize the joints between pavers to prevent sealant from seeping through.
Step 3: Sealant Application: We apply a high-quality sealant evenly across the paver surface.
Step 4: Curing Time: We allow the sealant to cure properly for optimal protection.

faq.question: Why is paver sealing important?
faq.answer: Paver sealing protects your pavers from stains, fading, water damage, and weed growth, extending their lifespan and enhancing their appearance.

faq.question: How often should I seal my pavers?
faq.answer: Pavers should be sealed every 2-3 years, depending on the level of traffic and exposure to the elements.

faq.question: Can I seal my pavers myself?
faq.answer: While DIY paver sealing is possible, it's best to hire a professional to ensure proper application and optimal results.

services.name: Concrete Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and cost-effective concrete paving solutions for driveways, patios, and walkways.
services.description:
For a robust and budget-friendly paving option, Arlington Pavers Inc provides expert concrete paving services. Ideal for driveways, patios, walkways, and more, concrete offers exceptional durability and versatility. Our team meticulously handles every stage, from precise grading and formwork to expert pouring and finishing. We understand the specifics of concrete work in the Arlington area, accounting for the region's soil conditions and climate fluctuations to ensure long-lasting results.

Choose from a variety of finishes, including broom-finished, stamped, or exposed aggregate, to achieve your desired aesthetic. We can also add color pigments to create custom shades that complement your property's exterior. Concrete paving provides a strong, stable surface that can withstand heavy use and the test of time. Our skilled team ensures proper curing techniques are employed to maximize the concrete's strength and minimize the risk of cracking.

Whether you're looking for a simple and functional driveway or an elaborate stamped concrete patio, Arlington Pavers Inc delivers quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. We prioritize clear communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding your expectations. We handle projects of all sizes, from small residential repairs to large commercial installations.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation: We clear and grade the area, ensuring a level and stable base.
Step 2: Formwork: We install precise formwork to define the shape and dimensions of the concrete slab.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring: We pour high-quality concrete mix according to industry standards.
Step 4: Finishing and Curing: We finish the concrete surface and employ proper curing techniques to maximize strength.

faq.question: How long does concrete paving last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, concrete paving can last for 25-50 years or more.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent concrete cracking?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation, reinforcement with rebar or wire mesh, and proper curing techniques are essential for preventing concrete cracking.

faq.question: How much does concrete paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of concrete paving varies depending on the size of the area, the complexity of the design, and the chosen finish. Contact us for a free quote.

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Arlington Pavers Inc did an outstanding job on my driveway. The crew was professional, efficient, and the quality of the work is top-notch. They even handled the permit process for me! Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: We hired Arlington Pavers Inc to install a patio in our backyard, and we couldn't be happier. The design process was collaborative, and the finished product is exactly what we envisioned. Great communication throughout the entire project.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Our walkway had several sunken pavers, creating a tripping hazard. Arlington Pavers Inc came out and quickly repaired the damage. The price was fair, and the work was done professionally.

reviews.name: Linda P.
reviews.text: Arlington Pavers Inc sealed our patio pavers, and the difference is remarkable. The colors are much more vibrant, and the surface is easier to clean. A great investment!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: From start to finish, Arlington Pavers Inc was fantastic. They helped us choose the perfect pavers for our home and installed them with precision. Our new driveway looks amazing!

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: We needed a new walkway leading to our front door, and Arlington Pavers Inc delivered. The walkway is beautiful and functional. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated clearly throughout.
